description: You are modernizing the 'RadiationPhysics' project. Refactor the legacy test class `src/test/java/com/medtech/physics/DoseCalculatorTest.java` by converting repetitive test methods into a single JUnit 5 `@ParameterizedTest`. Create a new test method named `testCalculateDoseParameterized` using `@CsvSource` to consolidate the data values for Monitor Units, Field Size Factor, and Expected Dose from the existing tests. Delete the five original repetitive methods (`testDoseAt100MU`, `testDoseAt200MU`, `testDoseAt50MU`, `testDoseLargeField`, and `testDoseSmallField`) and ensure all five test cases pass in the refactored version.
